'''Baxthrax''' were winged [[Sentience/Legends|sapients]].

They were one of many species that could be found in the avenues of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] at the tail end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="LW">{{StoryCite|story=Lone Wolf: A Tale of Obi-Wan and Luke|book=SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story}}</ref>

{{Species-stub}}
